_comment: searchoclock hook wiring (modern plugin pattern; paths via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}).

PostToolUseFailure(Bash) is the PRIMARY trigger: a non-zero Bash exit fires PostToolUseFailure, NOT PostToolUse (verified 2026-05-29 against code.claude.com/docs/en/hooks + anthropics/claude-code#24908).
PostToolUse(Bash) is a DEFENSIVE secondary: the same script self-gates there and only fires on an explicit failure signal (exit_code!=0 / is_error / interrupted / error).
The script never blocks (exit 0); it injects hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext.
